**_Summary_** * _People in 100 Mile House and surrounding communities are invited to read the timber supply review public discussion paper for the 100 Mile House Timber Supply Area (TSA) and provide feedback_ * _Feedback will help the chief forester determine a new allowable annual cut (AAC), which_ _defines the volume of timber that may be sustainably harvested from the TSA each year_ \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ The public is invited to give feedback on the upcoming timber supply review for the 100 Mile House Timber Supply Area (TSA).
